description: Visual accessibility QA team with parallel auditors, remediation planning, and fix implementation with re-audit verification

coordinator.responsibility: Scope assessment (page/component/full site), pipeline orchestration, parallel fan-in coordination

color-auditor.responsibility: OKLCH lightness/chroma analysis, contrast ratio (WCAG 2.1 + APCA), color blindness simulation

typo-auditor.responsibility: Typography readability: font size at breakpoints, line-height ratios, clamp() validation, reading width

focus-auditor.responsibility: Focus-visible completeness: tab-order, focus indicator visibility, skip-link, focus traps, ARIA live regions

remediation-planner.responsibility: Synthesize audit findings into prioritized remediation plan with code-level fix guidance

fix-implementer.responsibility: Implement a11y fixes: OKLCH color corrections, focus styles, ARIA attributes, reduced-motion queries

full.description: 3 parallel auditors -> remediation -> fix -> 2 parallel re-auditors

parallel_fan_in.description: 3 auditors run simultaneously, remediation waits for all 3

generator_critic.convergence: re-audit finds 0 critical and 0 high issues

chrome_devtools.description: Chrome DevTools integration for rendered verification
chrome_devtools.degradation: If unavailable, degrade to static analysis only
